title: I Turned Cheap Cloud Storage Into a 1PB Local Drive (With JuiceFS)
summary: JuiceFS is a POSIX-compliant virtual file system that layers multi-tiered caching on top of cloud object storage like AWS S3, enabling local NVMe performance with cloud scalability. The demo shows setup with Redis metadata, local SSD caching, and AI inference workloads integrated with Prometheus monitoring.
